name: nelson
description: Commands a Royal Navy agent squadron from sailing orders through execution and stand-down. Use when work can be parallelized, requires tight coordination, or needs explicit action-station controls, quality gates, and a final captain's log.
scan_summary: Well-structured multi-agent coordination skill with clean SKILL.md, MIT license, linting/lint configs, no executable scripts with dangerous patterns. Contains check-references.sh and count-tokens.py helper scripts that are benign. Uses established plugin marketplace format. No hooks, no network calls, no credential handling. Reference files are pure Markdown templates.
